CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-29-2013 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-30-2013 Continued To Aug-14-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-17-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 611
Judge: Lynn O. Taylor
Court Clerk: J. Rios Merida
Reporter: None

09:45 AM: case called for hearing; no appearance by either side. Tentative ruling stands.

Defendants' Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND (1) to allege proper Plaintiff instead of "the estate of David Forks"; (2) as to
First and Second causes of action (Elder Abuse) as to Plaintiff Vinnie Forks to allege facts supporting tolling of statute of limitations in light of allegations in paragraph 26 and 73; and to allege facts from which reasonable person could conclude that David Forks lacked capacity; (3)Third cause of action (breach of fiduciary duty) to allege fiduciary duty owed by lender and lender's agent and facts showing tolling of statute of limitations. First, Second and Third causes of action are not pre-empted by HOLA as they are based in part on allegation that Defendants diverted $71,629.35; otherwise pre-empted See Loder v. World Saving Bank (N.D. Cal. 2011) 2011 WL 1884733 =(611/VJ Taylor)
